summary: Iteration 11 - Pipeline Rename + Auto-Job Creation + Employee Search - 17 PASSED, 1 SKIPPED (bug). Comprehensive testing of stage rename (move_ahead→selected, dead→rejected), auto-job creation on employee exit, and employee search/filter features.

critical.issue: Legacy 'dead' alias returns 400 'Invalid stage'. The code at line 201 in leads.py handles 'dead' as alias for 'rejected', but validation at line 177 rejects it because 'dead' is not in PIPELINE_STAGES.
critical.fix: Add 'dead' to PIPELINE_STAGES in auth_utils.py OR normalize 'dead' to 'rejected' before validation in leads.py

passed_tests: GET /api/leads/pipeline-stats returns new stage names (new_lead, qualified, hr_interview, manager_interview, selected, joined, hold, rejected)
HO pipeline: new_lead → qualified transition works
HO pipeline: qualified → hr_interview transition works
HO pipeline: hr_interview → manager_interview requires HR questionnaire (400 if missing)
HO pipeline: Full path to 'selected' works with HR + Manager questionnaires
Tech pipeline: manager_interview stage correctly blocked (400 'Technician pipeline has no Manager Interview')
Tech pipeline: selected requires HR questionnaire (not manager)
Tech pipeline: Full path to 'selected' works with HR questionnaire only
Transition to 'rejected' requires rejection_reason (400 if missing)
Transition to 'rejected' with rejection_reason works correctly
POST /api/employees/{id}/exit with auto_create_job=true creates job with auto_created_from_exit=true, exit_employee_id, exit_employee_name
POST /api/employees/{id}/exit with auto_create_job=true notifies Sr HR users
POST /api/employees/{id}/exit with auto_create_job=true notifies Jr HR users
POST /api/employees/{id}/exit with auto_create_job=false returns auto_job_id=null (no job created)
GET /api/employees?branch_id=<id> filters to that branch only
Convert lead to employee works from 'selected' stage (new name)
Convert lead to employee blocked from 'new_lead' stage (must be selected/joined)
skipped_tests: Legacy 'dead' alias test - SKIPPED due to bug (dead not in PIPELINE_STAGES)
action_items: FIX BUG: Add 'dead' to PIPELINE_STAGES in /app/backend/auth_utils.py line 31 (PARALLEL_STAGES = ['hold', 'rejected', 'dead']) OR normalize 'dead' to 'rejected' before validation in /app/backend/routes/leads.py
critical_code_review_comments: BUG: Legacy 'dead' alias not working - validation at line 177 in leads.py rejects 'dead' before alias handling at line 201 can process it
seed_data_creation: Test leads/employees created with TEST_ prefix pattern for pipeline and exit tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested pipeline rename (selected/rejected), auto-job creation on exit, and employee search. One bug found: legacy 'dead' alias not working. All other features working correctly. Auto-job creation creates jobs with auto_created_from_exit=true and notifies Sr/Jr HR users. Employee search supports case-insensitive regex across name, role, location_city, department, phone, email fields.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: PIPELINE_STAGES in auth_utils.py only contains 'rejected', not 'dead'. The validation at line 177 in leads.py checks 'if to_stage not in PIPELINE_STAGES' which fails for 'dead'. The alias handling at line 201 ('elif to_stage in ("rejected", "dead")') never gets reached.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add 'dead' to PARALLEL_STAGES in auth_utils.py: PARALLEL_STAGES = ['hold', 'rejected', 'dead']
